title: lvrsrc validate output
description: JSON produced by `lvrsrc validate <file> --json`. Exit codes: 0 = valid, 1 = warnings only, 2 = at least one error.

valid.description: True iff exitCode == 0 (no warnings and no errors).

exitCode.description: CLI exit code. 0 = valid, 1 = warnings, 2 = errors.

issues.description: Issue list. May be null (or an empty array) when no issues were found.

code.description: Stable, dotted identifier for the check that produced the issue (e.g. "header.mismatch", "section.size.zero", "name.offset.bounds").

message.description: Human-readable explanation with concrete values interpolated.

area.description: High-level region the issue applies to (e.g. "header", "block", "section", "name").

offset.description: Byte offset within the file, when relevant. Zero otherwise.

blockType.description: FourCC of the block the issue refers to, or "" if not block-scoped.

sectionIndex.description: Section index (resource ID) within blockType, or 0 if not section-scoped.

nameOffset.description: Offset into the name table when the issue involves a name, or 0 otherwise.
